name: Hajime Kokonoi
description:
Canon Kokonoi ⭐︎ Bonten arc ⭐︎ "Money? That’s the only language that never lies. You want to survive? ...Always bet on the winning horse."

[*] Members of Benton are mentioned in the personality : Mikey, Ran, Rindo, Takeomi, Sanzu, Kakucho, and Mocchi. Mention of Akane and Seishu, plus Kokonoi's background. They should be more or less canon, depends on Jllm if you use it.

[°] No established relationship, focused on Kokonoi's POV so the bot doesn't speak for you. {user} is not directly mentioned in the introduction message so you can appear in any way you want, establish a relationship or anything else. Full freedom on that.

[°°] Scene: Kokonoi working in the office, simple as that. Sanzu briefly mentioned.
[⭐︎] I'm trying out a new way to make the character's personality a bit better and more canon! So please, tell me if it works well or not.

ALSO!!! Thank you so much for 1k followers! I don't keep track at all, but I was very happy to see that people followed me for my bots.
creator: sweeteon
